queries.name: vlp_hop1_has_rows
queries.cypher: CALL variable_length_path(maxHops := 1) YIELD source, target, length, path RETURN COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows

queries.name: vlp_hop1_all_length_one
queries.cypher: CALL variable_length_path(maxHops := 1) YIELD source, target, length, path RETURN MAX(length) = 1 AS exact

queries.name: vlp_hop2_max_bound
queries.cypher: CALL variable_length_path(maxHops := 2) YIELD source, target, length, path RETURN MAX(length) <= 2 AS bounded

queries.name: vlp_hop2_more_paths_than_hop1
queries.cypher: CALL variable_length_path(maxHops := 2) YIELD source, target, length RETURN COUNT(*) AS cnt_2

queries.name: vlp_hop1_count_for_reference
queries.cypher: CALL variable_length_path(maxHops := 1) YIELD source, target, length RETURN COUNT(*) AS cnt_1

queries.name: vlp_path_column_populated
queries.cypher: CALL variable_length_path(maxHops := 1) YIELD source, target, length, path RETURN MIN(LENGTH(path)) > 0 AS path_non_empty

queries.name: vlp_source_target_non_equal
queries.cypher: CALL variable_length_path(maxHops := 2) YIELD source, target, length, path RETURN COUNT(*) = SUM(CASE WHEN source <> target THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_self_paths

queries.name: k_hop_2_more_than_1
queries.cypher: CALL k_hop(maxHops := 2) YIELD node, source, hops RETURN COUNT(*) AS cnt_2

queries.name: k_hop_1_for_reference
queries.cypher: CALL k_hop(maxHops := 1) YIELD node, source, hops RETURN COUNT(*) AS cnt_1

queries.name: k_hop_hops_always_positive
queries.cypher: CALL k_hop(maxHops := 3) YIELD node, source, hops RETURN MIN(hops) >= 1 AS positive

queries.name: k_hop_max_hops_3_bound
queries.cypher: CALL k_hop(maxHops := 3) YIELD node, source, hops RETURN MAX(hops) <= 3 AS bounded

queries.name: delta_stepping_yields_rows
queries.cypher: CALL sssp_delta() YIELD node, distance RETURN COUNT(*) AS row_count

queries.name: delta_stepping_alias
queries.cypher: CALL delta_stepping() YIELD node, distance RETURN COUNT(*) AS row_count

queries.name: delta_stepping_non_negative_distances
queries.cypher: CALL sssp_delta() YIELD node, distance WHERE distance IS NOT NULL RETURN MIN(distance) >= 0 AS ok
queries.errorMessage: Syntax error at line 1, column 39: no viable alternative at input 'CALL sssp_delta() YIELD node, distance WHERE'

queries.name: delta_stepping_same_count_as_sssp
queries.cypher: CALL sssp_delta() YIELD node, distance WHERE distance IS NOT NULL RETURN COUNT(*) AS delta_reachable
queries.errorMessage: Syntax error at line 1, column 39: no viable alternative at input 'CALL sssp_delta() YIELD node, distance WHERE'
